Class LoginCommand

java.lang.Object
commands.LoginCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
Command
public class LoginCommand extends Object implements Command
Command implementation for handling user login requests. This class validates user credentials, checks for existing active sessions to prevent dual logins, and stores session information (user details and ID) upon successful authentication. It maintains a global map of active users to manage concurrency and state across the server.

    Controller responsible for retrieving user records and information.

  • Field Details

    • userController

      private final UserController userController
      Controller responsible for retrieving user records and information.

    • activeUsers

      private static final ConcurrentHashMap<Integer, ConnectionToClient> activeUsers
      A thread-safe map that tracks all currently logged-in users. Key: userID (Integer), Value: ConnectionToClient instance.

  • Constructor Details

    • LoginCommand

      public LoginCommand()
      Constructs a new LoginCommand and initializes the user controller.

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public void execute(Object data, ConnectionToClient client)
      Executes the login authentication logic. The process includes: 1. Checking if the user is already logged in via activeUsers map. 2. Fetching user data from the database. 3. Validating the membership code based on the specific UserRole. 4. Saving session data in the ConnectionToClient object. 5. Adding the user to the global activeUsers list.
      Specified by:
      execute in interface Command
      Parameters:
      data - the LoginRequest object containing userID and membershipCode
      client - the connection to the client attempting to log in

    • updateSession

      private void updateSession(ConnectionToClient client, int userID, User user)
      Helper method to store session data and track the active user. * @param client the client connection
      Parameters:
      userID - the ID of the user
      user - the user object to store in the session

    • logoutUser

      public static void logoutUser(int userID)
      Removes a user from the active users map, effectively logging them out. This method is called by LogoutCommand or upon client disconnection.
      Parameters:
      userID - the ID of the user to be removed
